style_authority.note: Reads the surface as a calm high-frequency operations tool and prioritizes causal direct manipulation, continuity, and task context over spectacle.

reference_selection.note: Applies motion quality, interaction physics, transform ownership, reduced-motion, performance, responsive, and device-validation guidance.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Keeps causal motion while rejecting pointer-chasing transitions, layout animation, whole-sheet scale, fixed ease-in settling, bounce, and decorative overshoot.

evidence_level.note: Labels the review as static-source evidence and does not claim measured smoothness, frame rate, layout cost, browser behavior, or physical touch quality.

verified_boundary.note: Separates source facts from unverified geometry, browser arbitration, reduced-motion runtime, responsiveness, frame pacing, and device behavior.

design_moves.note: Provides eight moves covering pointer capture, grab offset, interruption, measured release velocity, projection, hysteresis, soft bounds, and reduced motion.

scope_control.note: Remains read-only and motion-specific with five blocking findings and eight moves in 115 logical lines, below the 150-line cap.
